en.title: Best Protein Powders 2026
en.description: The best protein powders of 2026 ranked by protein quality, third-party testing, taste, and cost per serving, from premium grass-fed whey isolate to the best budget tubs and top plant-based picks.

zh-tw.title: 最佳蛋白粉 2026
zh-tw.description: 2026 年最值得買的蛋白粉實測排行，從草飼分離乳清、最強性價比大桶裝到頂尖植物基配方，依蛋白品質、第三方檢驗、口味與每份成本完整評比。

en.description: A 28g grass-fed whey isolate at 88% protein by weight with no artificial sweeteners, fillers, or dyes, and Informed Choice certification on every batch, which makes it the cleanest high-protein scoop on the market.

zh-tw.description: 每份 28 克草飼分離乳清，蛋白佔比高達 88%，零人工甜味劑、零填充劑、零色素，每批都過 Informed Choice 認證，是市面上最乾淨的高蛋白配方，價位約 NT$1,900。

en.description: The best-selling whey in America for over two decades, delivering 24g of protein and 5.5g of naturally occurring BCAAs per scoop in a formula that mixes instantly with a spoon and tastes good enough to drink in water.

zh-tw.description: 在美國暢銷超過二十年的乳清王者，每份 24 克蛋白加 5.5 克天然 BCAA，一支湯匙就能秒溶，加水直接喝都好喝，台灣 momo、PChome 都有官方代理，價位約 NT$2,200。

en.description: Cold-processed European grass-fed whey isolate with 20g of protein and NSF Certified for Sport on every batch, which screens for over 270 banned substances and makes it the pick athletes trust for drug-tested competition.

zh-tw.description: 歐洲草飼乳清冷製分離，每份 20 克蛋白，每批都過 NSF Certified for Sport 認證，篩檢超過 270 種禁用物質，需要藥檢的運動員選這支最安心，需代購，價位約 NT$2,100。

en.description: A 5-pound tub delivering 25g of protein per serving at roughly a dollar a scoop, third-party tested and made in the USA, which makes it the budget workhorse for anyone hitting a high daily protein target.

zh-tw.description: 五磅大桶裝每份 25 克蛋白，一份成本約台幣 30 元，第三方檢驗、美國製造，每天要灌大量蛋白又想省錢的人選這桶最實在，需代購，價位約 NT$1,500。

en.description: A minimalist 20g whey isolate with NSF Certified for Sport status and almost nothing else in the tub, designed to mix cleanly into any shake or recipe as a pure protein boost for athletes who want zero guesswork.

zh-tw.description: 極簡配方分離乳清每份 20 克蛋白，過 NSF Certified for Sport 認證，桶裡幾乎沒別的東西，加進任何飲品或料理都不搶味，要的就是純粹補蛋白的運動員首選，需代購，價位約 NT$1,600。

en.description: A 30g organic plant blend with 5.5g BCAAs, probiotics, and both NSF Certified for Sport and Informed Choice certification, making it the best vegan option for athletes who need a complete amino profile without dairy.

zh-tw.description: 每份 30 克有機植物蛋白，含 5.5 克 BCAA 加益生菌，同時過 NSF Certified for Sport 和 Informed Choice 雙認證，乳糖不耐或吃素又要完整胺基酸的運動員，這支是最強植物基選擇，價位約 NT$1,500。

en.description: Chris Bumstead's whey isolate line built around dessert-grade flavors like Cinnamon Crunch and Fruity Cereal, delivering 25g of protein per scoop in the formula that consistently wins blind taste tests.

zh-tw.description: 健美冠軍 Chris Bumstead 的分離乳清系列，主打肉桂麥片、水果穀片這種甜點級口味，每份 25 克蛋白，盲測口味評比常常拿第一，嘴叼又怕乳清難喝的人選它，需代購，價位約 NT$1,750。

en.description: A single-ingredient grass-fed whey concentrate with nothing but whey in the tub, no sweeteners, gums, or flavors, which makes it the purest pick for people who want to control exactly what goes into their shake.

zh-tw.description: 單一成分草飼濃縮乳清，桶裡就只有乳清，零甜味劑、零增稠劑、零香料，想完全掌控自己喝進什麼的人，這桶純度最高，五磅裝需代購，價位約 NT$3,000。

en.description: A 20g vegan pea protein with a full BCAA profile, traceable sourcing, and third-party heavy-metal testing in a sugar-free formula, built for people who care as much about label transparency as about grams of protein.

zh-tw.description: 每份 20 克純素豌豆蛋白，完整 BCAA、可追溯來源、第三方重金屬檢驗，無糖配方，看重成分透明度跟看重蛋白克數一樣多的人會喜歡這支，需代購，價位約 NT$1,300。

en.description: A USDA Organic pea-and-brown-rice blend with 21g of protein, no added sugar, and wide availability at grocery and warehouse clubs, making it the easiest plant-based protein to find and the friendliest on the wallet.

zh-tw.description: USDA 有機認證的豌豆加糙米配方，每份 21 克蛋白、無添加糖，在賣場和量販店到處買得到，最好入手又最親民的植物基蛋白就是它，價位約 NT$900。

references.title: The 7 Best Protein Powders of 2026: RD Tested and Approved
Optimum Nutrition 100% Whey Gold Standard Review (2026)
Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Protein Isolate Review (2026)
7 Best NSF Certified Protein Powders of 2026 (Whey & Plant)

en.commentary:
I judge a protein powder on three things that actually matter: how much real protein lands in each scoop, what else is hiding in the tub, and whether you will keep buying it once the novelty wears off. By that standard the Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Isolate is the best protein powder you can buy in 2026. At 28g of protein for a 32g scoop, it is 88% protein by weight, which is about as efficient as whey isolate gets, and the label is spotless: no artificial sweeteners, no fillers, no dyes, with Informed Choice testing on every batch. At roughly $2 a serving it costs more than a budget tub, but you are paying for grams of protein per dollar that hold up under scrutiny.

The Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard at number two is the one I recommend to most people, and it has earned that the hard way by staying the best-selling whey in America for over twenty years. It mixes instantly with nothing but a spoon, tastes genuinely good in plain water, and its Vanilla Ice Cream flavor landed in the top 10% of all proteins tested for heavy metals and contaminants. For the price, nothing touches its combination of convenience and quality. Momentous takes third on the strength of its NSF Certified for Sport status, which is the certification that matters if you get drug tested, and Nutricost claims fourth as the budget king at about a dollar a scoop for a 5-pound tub.

The back half of this list is about matching a powder to a need. Klean Athlete is the minimalist NSF isolate for athletes who want nothing extra. Garden of Life Sport is the best plant-based protein for anyone avoiding dairy, with a full 30g and dual sport certification. Raw Nutrition's CBUM line wins purely on taste, with dessert flavors that make a daily shake something to look forward to. Naked Whey is the single-ingredient purist's choice, Ritual is the pick for label obsessives, and Orgain is the organic plant protein you can grab at any grocery store for under thirty bucks. There is a right answer here for every goal and every budget.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs wins because it gives you the most protein with the least junk
highlights.body: Most whey tubs pad their scoop weight with cheap fillers, gums, and artificial sweeteners that inflate the serving size without adding protein. Transparent Labs goes the other way: 28g of protein in a 32g scoop puts it at 88% protein by weight, near the ceiling for whey isolate, and the rest of the label is just stevia and natural flavor. Informed Choice certification on every batch means an independent lab has verified it is free of banned substances and matches its label. When I rank on protein quality and ingredient purity together, nothing else comes close to this efficiency.

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard is the protein I hand to beginners and never apologize for
highlights.body: Twenty years as America's best-selling whey is not an accident. Gold Standard nails the two things that make people actually stick with a protein: it dissolves instantly with a spoon and no shaker drama, and it tastes good enough to drink in plain water. Beyond convenience, its Vanilla Ice Cream flavor finished in the top 10% of all proteins independently tested for heavy metals, pesticides, and plasticizers, earning an overall A grade. You get 24g of protein and 5.5g of naturally occurring BCAAs per scoop at a price that undercuts almost every premium tub. For most people, this is the smart default.

highlights.title: Momentous is the only pick that matters if you get drug tested
highlights.body: NSF Certified for Sport is the highest bar in the supplement industry. It screens every batch for over 270 banned substances, verifies the label is accurate, and audits the manufacturing facility itself. For a college athlete, a military member, or anyone competing under anti-doping rules, that certification is the difference between a safe purchase and a failed test. Momentous backs it with cold-processed European grass-fed whey isolate and a clean formula. It delivers 20g per serving rather than the 24-28g of the leaders, so it is not the most protein per scoop, and it costs more, but for tested athletes the peace of mind is the entire point.

highlights.title: Nutricost proves you do not need to overpay to hit your protein target
highlights.body: Hitting a gram of protein per pound of bodyweight gets expensive fast when you are paying $2 a scoop. Nutricost solves that with a 5-pound tub delivering 25g of protein per serving at roughly a dollar a scoop, third-party tested and made in the USA. The flavoring is simpler and it mixes a touch thicker than premium isolates, but the protein is real and the price per gram is the best on this list. For anyone eating big to build muscle, this is the tub that keeps a high-protein diet affordable month after month.

highlights.title: Garden of Life Sport is the plant protein that actually competes with whey
highlights.body: Plant proteins usually force a compromise on amino acid completeness or protein quantity. Garden of Life Sport refuses both. It packs 30g of organic plant protein with 5.5g of BCAAs and 5g of glutamine, and it carries both NSF Certified for Sport and Informed Choice certification, which almost no vegan protein can claim. For athletes who avoid dairy, whether for lactose intolerance, ethics, or digestion, this is the one that delivers a complete amino profile and competition-grade testing in the same scoop. It is the plant-based protein I recommend without hesitation.

zh-tw.commentary:
我評蛋白粉只認三件真正重要的事：每一份實際進帳多少蛋白、桶子裡還藏了什麼、以及新鮮感過了之後你會不會繼續買。用這個標準看下來，Transparent Labs 100% 草飼分離乳清就是 2026 年你能買到最好的蛋白粉。一份 32 克的粉裡有 28 克蛋白，蛋白佔比 88%，已經接近分離乳清的物理極限，成分表又乾淨到誇張，零人工甜味劑、零填充劑、零色素，每批還過 Informed Choice 檢驗。一份成本約台幣 60 元，比大桶平價款貴，但你買到的是經得起檢驗的每元蛋白含量，這錢花得值。

第二名 Optimum Nutrition 金牌乳清是我會推薦給大多數人的那支，而且它是硬實力換來的，連續二十幾年穩坐美國乳清銷售冠軍。一支湯匙就能秒溶，加白開水都好喝，它的香草冰淇淋口味在重金屬和污染物檢測中排進所有蛋白粉的前 10%。論這個價位，便利性加品質沒有對手。第三名 Momentous 靠的是 NSF Certified for Sport 認證，這張認證對需要藥檢的人來說就是關鍵。第四名 Nutricost 是預算之王，五磅裝一份成本約台幣 30 元。

榜單後半段就是把對的粉配給對的需求。Klean Athlete 是極簡 NSF 分離乳清，運動員要的就是純粹不囉嗦。Garden of Life Sport 是避開乳製品族群的最強植物基，整整 30 克加雙重運動認證。Raw Nutrition 的 CBUM 系列純靠口味取勝，甜點級風味讓你每天搖那一杯變成期待。Naked Whey 是單一成分純粹派的選擇，Ritual 是成分控的首選，Orgain 則是你在任何賣場都買得到、不到台幣九百的有機植物蛋白。不管你的目標和預算是什麼，這裡都有正確答案。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 勝出，因為它給你最多蛋白、最少雜質
highlights.body: 多數乳清會用便宜的填充劑、增稠膠和人工甜味劑灌大每份重量，份量看起來變多，蛋白卻沒增加。Transparent Labs 反其道而行，32 克的粉裡塞進 28 克蛋白，蛋白佔比 88%，逼近分離乳清的上限，剩下的成分就只有甜菊糖和天然香料。每批都過 Informed Choice 認證，代表獨立實驗室已經驗證它不含禁用物質、標示與實物相符。當我把蛋白品質和成分純度合在一起評分時，這種效率沒有別支追得上。

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition 金牌乳清是我推給新手、而且從不需要道歉的那支
highlights.body: 連續二十幾年當美國乳清銷售冠軍是有道理的。金牌乳清抓住了讓人真的願意長期喝下去的兩個關鍵：一支湯匙就秒溶，不用搖搖杯搖到天荒地老；加白開水就夠好喝。便利之外，它的香草冰淇淋口味在重金屬、農藥、塑化劑的獨立檢測中排進所有蛋白粉前 10%，拿到整體 A 級評等。每份 24 克蛋白加 5.5 克天然 BCAA，價格還壓在幾乎所有高階款之下。對大多數人來說，這就是最聰明的預設選擇。

highlights.title: 會被藥檢的人，唯一該選的就是 Momentous
highlights.body: NSF Certified for Sport 是補給品產業的最高門檻。它逐批篩檢超過 270 種禁用物質、驗證標示準確、還稽核製造廠本身。對大學運動員、軍人、或任何受反禁藥規範的人來說，這張認證就是安全購買和藥檢失格之間的差別。Momentous 用歐洲草飼乳清冷製分離加上乾淨配方撐起這張認證。它每份 20 克蛋白，份量中等、價格也偏高，但對要藥檢的運動員來說，那份安心就是全部的重點。

highlights.title: Nutricost 證明衝蛋白目標不用花冤枉錢
highlights.body: 想吃到每磅體重一克蛋白，一份花台幣 60 元很快就燒錢。Nutricost 用五磅大桶裝解決這件事，每份 25 克蛋白、一份成本約台幣 30 元，第三方檢驗、美國製造。調味比較單純，沖泡口感也比高階分離乳清稠一點，但蛋白是實打實的，每克蛋白的價格是這份榜單最低。對任何要吃大量蛋白增肌的人，這桶能讓高蛋白飲食月復一月都負擔得起。

highlights.title: Garden of Life Sport 是真的能跟乳清正面對打的植物蛋白
highlights.body: 植物蛋白通常逼你在胺基酸完整度和蛋白份量之間二選一妥協。Garden of Life Sport 兩個都不讓。它一份塞進 30 克有機植物蛋白，含 5.5 克 BCAA 和 5 克麩醯胺酸，同時掛著 NSF Certified for Sport 和 Informed Choice 雙認證，這是幾乎沒有植物蛋白能宣稱的。對避開乳製品的運動員來說，不管是因為乳糖不耐、理念還是消化考量，這支在同一份裡同時給你完整胺基酸和競賽級檢驗。它是我會毫不猶豫推薦的植物基蛋白。

references.title: The 7 Best Protein Powders of 2026: RD Tested and Approved
Top 9 Best Whey Isolate Protein Powders of 2026, Picked by an RDN

en.commentary:
Three things decide this ranking: how much real protein lands in each scoop, what else is hiding in the tub, and whether you keep buying it after the novelty fades. By that measure the Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Isolate is still the best protein powder you can buy in June 2026, and Fortune's RD-tested roundup this month named the same tub its overall pick for the same reasons I do. At 28g of protein in a 32g scoop it is 88% protein by weight, about as efficient as isolate gets, and the label is spotless: stevia, natural flavor, and full batch transparency through publicly posted test results. At roughly $2 a serving you pay for grams per dollar that survive scrutiny.

Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard holds second and remains the one I hand to most people. Two decades as America's best-selling whey is not luck. It dissolves with a spoon, tastes good in plain water, and delivers 24g of protein plus 5.5g of naturally occurring BCAAs at a price that undercuts almost every premium tub. Momentous keeps third on the strength of NSF Certified for Sport, the certification that decides safe-versus-failed-test for drug-tested athletes, and BarBend's fresh isolate roundup this week again flagged it as a top European grass-fed pick. Nutricost stays fourth as the budget king at about a dollar a scoop for a 5-pound tub.

The back half matches a powder to a need, and nothing moved this week. Klean Athlete is the minimalist NSF isolate. Garden of Life Sport is the best plant pick for anyone avoiding dairy, with a full 30g and dual sport certification. Raw Nutrition's CBUM line wins purely on dessert-grade taste. Naked Whey is the single-ingredient purist's tub, Ritual is for label obsessives, and Orgain is the under-thirty organic plant protein you can grab at any grocery store. Every goal and budget has a right answer here.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs wins because it gives you the most protein with the least junk
highlights.body: Most whey tubs pad scoop weight with cheap fillers and gums that inflate the serving without adding protein. Transparent Labs goes the other way: 28g of protein in a 32g scoop puts it at 88% protein by weight, near the ceiling for isolate, and the rest of the label is just stevia and natural flavor. Publicly posted batch test results mean you can verify what you are drinking rather than trust a marketing claim. Fortune's June RD-tested roundup landed on this exact tub as its overall winner. When I score protein quality and ingredient purity together, nothing matches this efficiency.

highlights.body: Twenty years as America's best-selling whey is earned. Gold Standard nails the two things that make people stick with a protein: it dissolves instantly with a spoon and no shaker drama, and it tastes good enough to drink in plain water. You get 24g of protein and 5.5g of naturally occurring BCAAs per scoop at a price that undercuts almost every premium tub. For most people building a daily habit, this is the smart default, and a year of reviews keeps confirming it.

highlights.title: Momentous is the only pick that matters if you get drug tested
highlights.body: NSF Certified for Sport is the highest bar in the supplement industry. It screens every batch for over 270 banned substances, verifies label accuracy, and audits the manufacturing facility itself. For a college athlete, a service member, or anyone under anti-doping rules, that certification is the line between a safe purchase and a failed test. BarBend's fresh isolate roundup this week again ranked Momentous among the top European grass-fed picks. It delivers 20g per serving rather than 24-28g and costs more, but for tested athletes the peace of mind is the whole point.

highlights.title: Nutricost proves you do not need to overpay to hit your protein target
highlights.body: Hitting a gram of protein per pound of bodyweight gets expensive fast at $2 a scoop. Nutricost solves that with a 5-pound tub delivering 25g of protein per serving at roughly a dollar a scoop, third-party tested and made in the USA. The flavoring is simpler and it mixes a touch thicker than premium isolates, but the protein is real and the price per gram is the best on this list. For anyone eating big to build muscle, this tub keeps a high-protein diet affordable month after month.

highlights.title: Garden of Life Sport is the plant protein that actually competes with whey
highlights.body: Plant proteins usually force a compromise on amino completeness or quantity. Garden of Life Sport refuses both. It packs 30g of organic plant protein with 5.5g of BCAAs and 5g of glutamine, and it carries both NSF Certified for Sport and Informed Choice certification, which almost no vegan protein can claim. For athletes avoiding dairy for lactose, ethics, or digestion, this delivers a complete amino profile and competition-grade testing in one scoop. It is the plant protein I recommend without hesitation.

第二名 Optimum Nutrition 金牌乳清，是我會推給大多數人的那支。連續二十幾年坐穩美國乳清銷售冠軍不是運氣。一支湯匙就秒溶，加白開水都好喝，每份 24 克蛋白加 5.5 克天然 BCAA，價格還壓在幾乎所有高階款之下。第三名 Momentous 靠的是 NSF Certified for Sport 認證，對要藥檢的人來說這就是安全跟失格的分界，BarBend 這週剛出的分離乳清評比也再次把它列進歐洲草飼頂尖名單。第四名 Nutricost 是預算之王，五磅裝一份成本約台幣 30 元。

榜單後半就是把對的粉配給對的需求，這週也都沒動。Klean Athlete 是極簡 NSF 分離乳清。Garden of Life Sport 是避開乳製品族群的最強植物基，整整 30 克加雙重運動認證。Raw Nutrition 的 CBUM 系列純靠甜點級口味取勝。Naked Whey 是單一成分純粹派的桶，Ritual 是成分控首選，Orgain 則是不到台幣九百、任何賣場都買得到的有機植物蛋白。老實講，不管你的目標和預算是什麼，這裡都有正確答案。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 勝出，因為它給你最多蛋白、最少雜質
highlights.body: 多數乳清會用便宜的填充劑和增稠膠灌大每份重量，份量看起來變多，蛋白卻沒增加。Transparent Labs 反其道而行，32 克的粉裡塞進 28 克蛋白，佔比 88%，逼近分離乳清上限，剩下的就只有甜菊糖和天然香料。每批檢驗報告公開可查，代表你喝的東西是能驗證的，不是靠行銷話術。Fortune 六月由營養師實測的評比，也正好把這桶選為整體冠軍。當我把蛋白品質和成分純度合在一起評分，這種效率真的沒有別支追得上。

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition 金牌乳清是我推給新手、而且從不需要道歉的那支
highlights.body: 連續二十幾年當美國乳清銷售冠軍是有道理的。金牌乳清抓住了讓人願意長期喝下去的兩個關鍵：一支湯匙就秒溶，不用跟搖搖杯搏鬥；加白開水就夠好喝。每份 24 克蛋白加 5.5 克天然 BCAA，價格還壓在幾乎所有高階款之下。對大多數想建立每天喝習慣的人來說，這就是最聰明的預設選擇，而且一整年的評測一直在印證這件事。

highlights.title: 會被藥檢的人，唯一該選的就是 Momentous
highlights.body: NSF Certified for Sport 是補給品產業的最高門檻。它逐批篩檢超過 270 種禁用物質、驗證標示準確、還稽核製造廠本身。對大學運動員、軍人、或任何受反禁藥規範的人，這張認證就是安全購買和藥檢失格的分界。BarBend 這週剛出的分離乳清評比，又把 Momentous 列進歐洲草飼頂尖名單。它每份 20 克蛋白、份量中等、價格偏高，但對要藥檢的運動員來說，那份安心就是全部重點。

highlights.title: Nutricost 證明衝蛋白目標不用花冤枉錢
highlights.body: 想吃到每磅體重一克蛋白，一份花台幣 60 元很快就燒錢。Nutricost 用五磅大桶解決這件事，每份 25 克蛋白、成本約台幣 30 元，第三方檢驗、美國製造。調味比較單純，沖泡口感也比高階分離乳清稠一點，不過蛋白是實打實的，每克蛋白的價格是這份榜單最低。對任何要吃大量蛋白增肌的人，這桶能讓高蛋白飲食月復一月都負擔得起。

highlights.title: Garden of Life Sport 是真的能跟乳清正面對打的植物蛋白
highlights.body: 植物蛋白通常逼你在胺基酸完整度和蛋白份量之間二選一妥協。Garden of Life Sport 兩個都不讓。它一份塞進 30 克有機植物蛋白，含 5.5 克 BCAA 和 5 克麩醯胺酸，同時掛著 NSF Certified for Sport 和 Informed Choice 雙認證，這是幾乎沒有植物蛋白能宣稱的。對避開乳製品的運動員來說，不管是乳糖不耐、理念還是消化考量，這支在同一份裡同時給你完整胺基酸和競賽級檢驗。它是我會毫不猶豫推薦的植物基蛋白。

references.title: Top 9 Best Whey Isolate Protein Powders of 2026, Picked by an RDN
Best Protein Powders 2026: Whey, Isolate & Plant Ranked

en.commentary:
The protein powder market in June 2026 rewards clean labels and honest protein-by-weight numbers, and my rankings hold steady. Transparent Labs 100% Grass-Fed Whey Isolate stays at number one, and reviewers this month keep calling it the cleanest premium isolate they tested, with 88% protein-by-weight and stevia-only sweetening that mixes smoothly with no artificial aftertaste. That combination of purity and taste is exactly why it leads.

Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard 100% Whey holds second as the best value blend, the bag most people should default to for 24g of protein, reliable mixability, and a price that stays sane. Momentous Essential Whey keeps third on the back of a genuinely clean ingredient profile and NSF certification that serious athletes need. Reviewers this season also kept flagging budget standouts in the isolate tier and grass-fed options from small Irish dairies, which validates the spread already on this list. Nothing this week justified a rank change. My guidance: Transparent Labs if purity is the priority and you do not mind paying for it, Gold Standard if you want the proven value default, and Momentous if third-party certification for clean sport supplements is non-negotiable.

highlights.title: Transparent Labs Whey Isolate stays the cleanest premium pick
highlights.body: Reviewers this month keep calling it the cleanest premium isolate tested for 2026, with 88% protein-by-weight and stevia-only sweetening that mixes smoothly in a shaker with no artificial aftertaste. If purity is your priority and you do not mind paying for it, this is the bag that delivers.

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard is the proven value default
highlights.body: It holds second as the blend most people should default to: 24g of protein, reliable mixability that never clumps, and a price that stays sane bag after bag. For the lifter who wants a dependable everyday protein without overthinking it, this is the smart, affordable pick.

highlights.title: Momentous Essential Whey wins on certification for serious athletes
highlights.body: It keeps third on a genuinely clean ingredient profile and NSF certification that competitive and tested athletes actually need. If third-party verification for a clean sport supplement is non-negotiable for you, this is the one to reach for.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年六月的蛋白粉市場,獎勵乾淨成分標示跟誠實的蛋白質含量比例,我的排名維持不變。Transparent Labs 100% 草飼乳清分離守第一,這個月評測還是一直把它叫做測過最乾淨的高階分離乳清,88% 的蛋白質重量比加上純甜菊糖調味,搖起來順、沒有人工甜味餘味。純度加風味的這個組合,正是它領先的原因。

Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard 100% Whey 守第二,是 CP 值最好的混合乳清,多數人該預設選的那一罐,24 克蛋白質、可靠的沖泡性、價格合理。Momentous Essential Whey 守第三,靠真正乾淨的成分表跟認真運動員需要的 NSF 認證。這季評測也一直點名分離乳清層的高 CP 值款跟來自愛爾蘭小酪農的草飼選項,印證了榜單上已有的分布。這禮拜沒有理由換排名。我的建議,純度優先又不介意付錢就 Transparent Labs,要驗證過的 CP 值預設就 Gold Standard,乾淨運動補給的第三方認證不能妥協就 Momentous。

highlights.title: Transparent Labs 乳清分離還是最乾淨的高階之選
highlights.body: 這個月評測還是把它叫做 2026 年測過最乾淨的高階分離乳清,88% 蛋白質重量比加純甜菊糖調味,搖杯裡沖得順、沒有人工甜味餘味。純度是你的優先、又不介意付這個錢,這罐就是能交出來的。

highlights.title: Optimum Nutrition Gold Standard 是驗證過的 CP 值預設
highlights.body: 它守第二,是多數人該預設選的混合乳清,24 克蛋白質、從不結塊的可靠沖泡性、一罐接一罐都合理的價格。想要一罐不用想太多的日常蛋白,這個就是聰明又划算的選擇。

highlights.title: Momentous Essential Whey 贏在認真運動員要的認證
highlights.body: 它守第三,靠真正乾淨的成分表跟競技與受檢運動員真正需要的 NSF 認證。乾淨運動補給的第三方驗證對你來說不能妥協,這罐就是該拿的那一罐。
